query: SELECT id, topic_id, job_type, status, provider, prompt_tokens, completion_tokens, total_tokens, ROUND(estimated_cost_usd, 5) as cost_usd, latency_ms, retry_count, error_message, idempotency_key, createdAt FROM generation_jobs ORDER BY createdAt ASC
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2wCcvzbmKRw9Pje.541775a93539 --database i2oxkxp52Nqaqoc37frtnY --execute SELECT id, topic_id, job_type, status, provider, prompt_tokens, completion_tokens, total_tokens, ROUND(estimated_cost_usd, 5) as cost_usd, latency_ms, retry_count, error_message, idempotency_key, createdAt FROM generation_jobs ORDER BY createdAt ASC
